chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Tr. Appl. No.S-04 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.266/2019 3. For hearing of main case 20-05-2019 None present for the applicant Mr. Faiz Muhammad M.Larik, Advocate for respondents.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The applicant is called absent without intimation. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. It appears that after filing this Criminal Transfer Application, the applicant has lost his interest; therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with exemption application. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
